summary: The complete legal input domain contains only the 64 squares of one fixed chessboard, so runtime scaling cannot represent the source contract.

workload_bound.source_constraint: the file is one of a through h and the rank is one of 1 through 8

replacement_checks.evidence: Every call converts exactly one file and one rank, adds their zero-based indices, and performs one parity test.
The certificate regression evaluates all 8 times 8 legal coordinates against an independent row-by-row alternating-color oracle.
